query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A head-and-shoulders portrait of a young man with shoulder-length light brown hair, wearing a dark crew-neck shirt and a thin chain necklace. Warm amber light illuminates one side of his face, highlighting his visible eye, cheekbone, and jawline, while the opposite side of his face and the entirety of the background are swallowed by deep shadow. He faces the camera with a neutral, direct gaze.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A head-and-shoulders portrait of a young man with shoulder-length light brown hair, wearing a dark crew-neck shirt and a thin chain necklace. Extreme underexposure buries one half of his face and the entire background in impenetrable blackness, leaving only a narrow slice of warm amber light to expose his eye, cheek, and jaw. The crushing darkness and stark isolation of the lit features generate an oppressive atmosphere of unease, dread, and psychological tension.
